Skip to content
bgms 0.1.6.4
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • Changelog

Summary method for `bgms` objects

Source: R/bgms-methods.R
summary.bgms.Rd

Returns posterior summaries and diagnostics for a fitted `bgms` model.

Usage

# S3 method for class 'bgms'
summary(object, ...)

Arguments

object

An object of class `bgms`.

...

Currently ignored.

Value

An object of class `summary.bgms` with posterior summaries.

See also

[bgm()], [print.bgms()], [coef.bgms()]

Other posterior-methods: coef.bgmCompare(), coef.bgms(), print.bgmCompare(), print.bgms(), summary.bgmCompare()

Examples

# \donttest{
fit = bgm(x = Wenchuan[, 1:3])
#> 2 rows with missing values excluded (n = 360 remaining).
#> To impute missing values instead, use na_action = "impute".
#> Chain 1 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 150/2000 (7.5%)
#> Chain 2 (Warmup): ⦗━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 124/2000 (6.2%)
#> Chain 3 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 93/2000 (4.7%)
#> Chain 4 (Warmup): ⦗━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 123/2000 (6.2%)
#> Total   (Warmup): ⦗━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 490/8000 (6.1%)
#> Elapsed: 0s | ETA: 0s
#> Chain 1 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 400/2000 (20.0%)
#> Chain 2 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 365/2000 (18.2%)
#> Chain 3 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 353/2000 (17.6%)
#> Chain 4 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 365/2000 (18.2%)
#> Total   (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1482/8000 (18.5%)
#> Elapsed: 1s | ETA: 4s
#> Chain 1 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 700/2000 (35.0%)
#> Chain 2 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 655/2000 (32.8%)
#> Chain 3 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 656/2000 (32.8%)
#> Chain 4 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 656/2000 (32.8%)
#> Total   (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 2667/8000 (33.3%)
#> Elapsed: 1s | ETA: 2s
#> Chain 1 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 950/2000 (47.5%)
#> Chain 2 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 917/2000 (45.9%)
#> Chain 3 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 922/2000 (46.1%)
#> Chain 4 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 930/2000 (46.5%)
#> Total   (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 3719/8000 (46.5%)
#> Elapsed: 2s | ETA: 2s
#> Chain 1 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1200/2000 (60.0%)
#> Chain 2 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1166/2000 (58.3%)
#> Chain 3 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1160/2000 (58.0%)
#> Chain 4 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1176/2000 (58.8%)
#> Total   (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 4702/8000 (58.8%)
#> Elapsed: 2s | ETA: 1s
#> Chain 1 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1450/2000 (72.5%)
#> Chain 2 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1419/2000 (71.0%)
#> Chain 3 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1409/2000 (70.5%)
#> Chain 4 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1424/2000 (71.2%)
#> Total   (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 5702/8000 (71.3%)
#> Elapsed: 3s | ETA: 1s
#> Chain 1 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1700/2000 (85.0%)
#> Chain 2 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1687/2000 (84.4%)
#> Chain 3 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━⦘ 1673/2000 (83.7%)
#> Chain 4 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1691/2000 (84.5%)
#> Total   (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 6751/8000 (84.4%)
#> Elapsed: 4s | ETA: 1s
#> Chain 1 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1950/2000 (97.5%)
#> Chain 2 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺⦘ 1958/2000 (97.9%)
#> Chain 3 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━⦘ 1913/2000 (95.7%)
#> Chain 4 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺⦘ 1952/2000 (97.6%)
#> Total   (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 7773/8000 (97.2%)
#> Elapsed: 4s | ETA: 0s
#> Chain 1 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 2000/2000 (100.0%)
#> Chain 2 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 2000/2000 (100.0%)
#> Chain 3 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 2000/2000 (100.0%)
#> Chain 4 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 2000/2000 (100.0%)
#> Total   (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 8000/8000 (100.0%)
#> Elapsed: 4s | ETA: 0s
summary(fit)
#> Posterior summaries from Bayesian estimation:
#> 
#> Category thresholds:
#>                 mean  mcse    sd    n_eff  Rhat
#> intrusion (1)  0.801 0.005 0.232 2028.055 1.003
#> intrusion (2) -1.186 0.008 0.293 1489.711 1.001
#> intrusion (3) -3.546 0.012 0.435 1247.292 1.000
#> intrusion (4) -7.455 0.020 0.688 1169.038 1.000
#> dreams (1)    -0.400 0.004 0.184 1884.074 1.003
#> dreams (2)    -3.293 0.009 0.309 1309.670 1.005
#> ... (use `summary(fit)$main` to see full output)
#> 
#> Pairwise interactions:
#>                   mean    sd  mcse    n_eff  Rhat
#> intrusion-dreams 0.699 0.002 0.067 1287.484 1.003
#> intrusion-flash  0.428 0.002 0.061 1501.258 1.000
#> dreams-flash     0.561 0.002 0.061 1572.101 1.003
#> Note: NA values are suppressed in the print table. They occur here when an 
#> indicator was zero across all iterations, so mcse/n_eff/Rhat are undefined;
#> `summary(fit)$pairwise` still contains the NA values.
#> 
#> Inclusion probabilities:
#>                  mean sd mcse n0->0 n0->1 n1->0 n1->1 n_eff Rhat
#> intrusion-dreams    1  0          0     0     0  3999           
#> intrusion-flash     1  0          0     0     0  3999           
#> dreams-flash        1  0          0     0     0  3999           
#> Note: NA values are suppressed in the print table. They occur when an indicator
#> was constant (all 0 or all 1) across all iterations, so sd/mcse/n_eff/Rhat
#> are undefined; `summary(fit)$indicator` still contains the NA values.
#> 
#> Use `summary(fit)$<component>` to access full results.
#> See the `easybgm` package for other summary and plotting tools.
# }
